Okay, so what is next? What happens after you finish this quick start module? Hopefully, if you're watching this video, it means that you are done with it and you are ready to launch your ads. Okay, so let's cover what is going to happen in this process. So what next? Right? So you're going to go through lead nurture next and lead nurture is going to be exactly how you're going to actually get the leads that you're going to be getting from this process to schedule appointments. Right? And then the most important thing is getting those leads to actually show for your appointments because guys, there's no sense in turning your ads on if you're not going to get your leads to show. So this is probably the most important process in the whole acquisition phase. Okay, is lead nurture. Right? How aggressive you are with this, how consistent you are with this is going to absolutely determine exactly how much money you make, how many clients you sign up and eventually what impact you're going to actually make. So take lead nurture super serious because it is. All right? So you're going to move on to sales, right? And what's happened up there sales, right? You have your ads up, you got leads coming in, you nurture those leads, they actually showed up to your gym and sales is where you turn those cold traffic leads into actual paying clients. Okay? This is where the money flows in, right? But here's the biggest thing that you want to remember on this is that you are not signing up these guys to make money. You're signing up these guys to earn a client. Right? That is, this is like, that's a super ball, right? To earn a long term client. Okay? What next, right? The first thing you're going to do is make sure that you have finished the quick start portal and you have your ads completely ready to launch. That means they are in Facebook. They're, they're in draft mode. They're not actually published yet, but everything is set up. Your, your, your landing page is set up. Your Zapier connections are set up. Your Google sheets, all of that stuff is completely set up and ready to go. Then you're going to attend your launch call with your implementation tech where she's going to review everything, check your system, make sure it's set up properly. Then you hit publish. Now it's really important that you know on that call, she is not going to set everything up for you. You need to come prepared for that on that call and she's going to check it and help you troubleshoot if something is broken. Okay? So do this work before you get there. Okay? Then while in the middle of that stuff, once you're pretty much done, you're ready to go with your ads. Even before you meet with your implementation tech, as long as you're done with your ads and you've done the quick start portal, then you should start watching the lead nurture module followed by the sales module. Okay? So that way you know exactly what to do when that lead comes in. Okay? Then after all of that, after you've attended your launch call with the implementation tech, your implementation tech is going to schedule your first official coaching call with someone like myself, your implementation specialist, who is going to dive in what questions you have based off of the lead nurture and sales module and make sure you are ready to actually crush your first sales appointments. Okay? So go ahead, do the work. I'm excited to see you on the other side.
